evidence_sentence: Both MyNF1 alpha and -beta supershift with an antiserum raised by using a peptide derived from the N terminus of polyomavirus enhancer-binding protein 2/core-binding factor (PEBP2/CBF) alpha subunit.
Gelshift competition and supershift experiments demonstrated the binding of the alpha subunit of the transcription factor AML1 to this site in HL-60 cells.
